# Jacob Yi — Portfolio

> Personal portfolio of Jacob Yi: Christian, Contrarian, Stoic. Senior software engineer and commodity broker. Showcases selected work, writing, and background.

This is the personal site at https://jacobyi.info, built with Next.js. The sections below cover the primary pages and ways to get in touch.

## Pages
- [Home](https://jacobyi.info/): Landing page and introduction.
- [About](https://jacobyi.info/about): Background, identities, and interests.
- [Work](https://jacobyi.info/work): Selected projects and case studies.
- [Blog](https://jacobyi.info/blog): Articles and writing.
- [Contact](https://jacobyi.info/contact): Ways to get in touch.

## Contact
- [Email](mailto:jacobyideveloper@gmail.com): jacobyideveloper@gmail.com
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/yi-jacob/): Professional profile.
